message:
Improve CI workflow for initial development

- Use RU_UNSAFE_MAIN=1 in test-install job to avoid dependency on
  GitHub releases (which don't exist yet during initial development)
- Fix release notes to reference checksums.txt (matching actual output)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,7 +49,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Test installer
         run: |
           chmod +x install.sh
-          DEST=/tmp/ru-test ./install.sh
+          # Use RU_UNSAFE_MAIN=1 to test main-branch install path
+          # (avoids dependency on GitHub releases existing)
+          RU_UNSAFE_MAIN=1 DEST=/tmp/ru-test ./install.sh
           /tmp/ru-test/ru --version
 
   version-check:

@@ -48,4 +48,4 @@ jobs:
 
             ## Checksums
 
-            Verify downloads with the `.sha256` files attached to this release.
+            Verify downloads with `checksums.txt` attached to this release.
